title: サクラチヨノオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O has inherited the dream of
winning the Japanese Derby from her beloved
role model, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She diligently prepares for the Derby alongside
her peers, Mejiro Ardan and Yaeno Muteki, who
have garnered much public attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky keeps an eye on her protege from
afar. Although Maruzensky hasn't exactly been
active in the Twinkle Series lately...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is Sakura Chiyono O's dream to one day stand
as her equal and win against Maruzensky in a
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For that reason, she wants to win the Derby and
become a phenomenal racer! Her racing career
has just begun, and she's already sprinting out the
gates!
